title: rosa acicularis subsp. acicularis
intro: Rosa acicularis subsp. acicularis is a subspecies of the fragrant rose, a flowering plant native to North America. It is a deciduous shrub with thorny stems and fragrant, pink to white flowers that are rich in medicinal properties. The plant contains flavonoids, phenolic acids, and volatile oils, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including inflammation, fever, and digestive problems, and are believed to provide health benefits such as antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. Rosa acicularis subsp. acicularis can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which have been used to support immune function, reduce stress, and promote overall well-being.
